frame_analyses.description: Film clapperboard showing 'PROD. Basics of Laparoscopy' presentation title
Title slide 'A Step by Step Approach to Basic Laparoscopy' with presenter credentials
Text slide showing 'Instruments', 'Patient Position', 'Trocar Entry' topics
Array of laparoscopic instruments laid out on green surgical drape
Diagram showing laparoscope field of view angles (0° and 30°)

score_components.formula_applied: Not applicable - no FLS task performed

confidence_rationale: Video clearly shows educational presentation slides and equipment displays rather than any FLS task performance. No patient simulator, no task-specific setup, no timed performance.
technique_summary: This is an educational video presentation about laparoscopy basics, not an FLS task performance. Contains instructional content about instruments, patient positioning, and trocar entry techniques.
improvement_suggestions: Not applicable - this is educational material, not a performance assessment
